response.overview: Gino and Max, the two most problematic but also most effective detectives, are forced to team up again to solve the case. At a luxurious gala evening, an object of extraordinary value is robbed by a famous and mysterious thief. Gino and Max, the two most problematic but also most effective detectives, are forced to team up again to solve the case. During their crazy investigations, Gino and Max discover that this is not just a theft, the stolen object hides a dark secret that could shake the entire country.
response.title: Policë për jetë
